title: Value Set Detail
description: This page shows a single VSAC value set — its constituent codes, OMOP standard concept mappings, clinical purpose, and the CMS measures that use it. The OMOP concept IDs can be copied as a JSON array and pasted directly into a care bundle's omop_concept_ids field.
tips: Click 'Copy OMOP concept_ids' to copy the full list of mapped OMOP concept IDs as a JSON array — use this to configure cohort criteria or care bundle definitions.
The 'Clinical focus' section describes the clinical intent of the value set as documented in VSAC.
The 'Used by CMS measures' section links to every eCQM that references this value set.
Not all source codes will have OMOP mappings — review unmapped codes if your cohort counts seem low.
The expansion version reflects the date this value set was last updated in VSAC. Older expansions may not include recently added codes.
